_comment: Phase 4.3 — bucket policy that explicitly denies object deletion and tampering with the Object Lock configuration, to ALL principals (Principal *). An explicit deny binds every principal in the account INCLUDING root while the policy exists -- but root can PutBucketPolicy to remove it, which is why this is defense-in-depth layered UNDER S3 Object Lock COMPLIANCE mode (the real WORM guarantee). Replace BUCKET. Used by scripts/phase-4/setup_s3_object_lock.py.
